hero.subtitle: Join the premium fitness experience. Certified trainers, state-of-the-art equipment, and a community that pushes you further.

about.description: At oxygengym, we believe in pushing boundaries. Our premium facility offers everything you need to transform your body and mind in an aesthetic, mood-lit environment.

programs.title: Strength Training
programs.description: Build muscle mass and increase your raw strength with our heavy lifting program.

programs.title: CrossFit
programs.description: High-intensity functional movements designed to push your cardiovascular endurance.

programs.title: Personal Training
programs.description: 1-on-1 coaching customized completely to your unique fitness goals.

programs.title: Yoga & Mobility
programs.description: Improve flexibility, balance, and mental focus with our expert-led yoga sessions.

programs.title: Cardio Fitness
programs.description: Optimized routines using modern cardio equipment to maximize calorie burn.

programs.title: Weight Loss
programs.description: Structured programs integrating workout, nutrition, and recovery for effective results.

videoGallery.title: Beast Mode: Full Body Workout
videoGallery.description: Follow along with Elite Trainer Marcus for a high-intensity full body smash session.

videoGallery.title: Advanced HIIT Cardio
videoGallery.description: Burn maximum calories in minimum time with this intense 20-minute guided cardio routine.

videoGallery.title: Master the Deadlift
videoGallery.description: Learn the perfect form to prevent injury and lift heavier in this detailed tutorial.

videoGallery.title: 10-Minute Core Crunch
videoGallery.description: A quick, equipment-free core routine you can do anywhere to build functional strength.

testimonials.text: "Oxygen gym ..jis ke naam mai oxygen ho ossa achi chiz kya hi hogi .gym Mai koi kemi nhi ha .gym boht badiya ha gym ka mahol boht badiya ha sikar ki A1 gym ha maina yha. Aake apna body mai boht Change dekha ha thanku too oxygen gym or Amit bhaiya ."
testimonials.name: Aman
testimonials.subtitle: Lost 30 lbs, gained confidence

testimonials.text: "I can't say enough good things about Oxygen Gym! From the moment I walked in, I was greeted with warmth and enthusiasm by the staff. The facilities are top-notch, with state-of-the-art equipment and spacious workout areas................."
testimonials.name: Ravi Dhariwal
testimonials.subtitle: Strength Athlete

testimonials.text: "Absolutely love working out at Oxygen Gym SikarThe staff is so welcoming, the trainers are experts in their field, and the classes are super fun.such a great way to push your limits! Highly recommended for anyone looking for a positive fitness environment."
testimonials.name: VIP Uttam
testimonials.subtitle: Yoga Enthusiast

testimonials.text: "Gym ki sari services best hain & sari machines available hain, fully equipped hai Premium location par aur kafi spacious hain to kisi din crowd jyada hoti hai tab bhi koi as such space ki dikat nhi aati.Owner Amit bhai gym me mahool bana ke rakhta hai"
testimonials.name: Abhishek Singh
testimonials.subtitle: Personal Training Client

footer.description: Premium fitness experience designed to transform your life.
